# FinBIF R package

The `finbif` R package is a programmatic interface to the [Finnish
Biodiversity Information Facility (FinBIF) API](https://api.laji.fi).
FinBIF aggregates Finnish biodiversity data from multiple sources in a
single open access portal for researchers, citizen scientists, industry
and government. FinBIF allows users of biodiversity information to find,
access, combine and visualise data on Finnish plants, animals and
microorganisms. The `finbif` R package makes the publicly available data
in FinBIF easily accessible to programmers. Biodiversity information is
available on taxonomy and taxon occurrence. Occurrence data can be
filtered by taxon, time, location and other variables. The data accessed
are conveniently preformatted for subsequent analyses.

## Installation

You can install the current stable version of `finbif` from
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org),

``` r
install.packages("finbif")
```

You can also install the latest development version of `finbif` from
[GitHub](https://github.com),

``` r
remotes::install_github("luomus/finbif@dev")
```

## Documentation

Read the online documentation for the current stable version of `finbif`
[here](https://luomus.github.io/finbif/), or the latest development
version of `finbif` [here](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app).

## Getting a FinBIF access token

First load the `finbif` R package.

``` r
library(finbif)
```

To use the FinBIF API you must first request and set a personal access
token. You can request an API token to be sent to your email address
with the function `finbif_get_token`.

``` r
finbif_request_token("your@email.com")
```

Copy the access token that was sent to your email and set it as the
environment variable `FINBIF_ACCESS_TOKEN` either for the current
session,

``` r
Sys.setenv(
  FINBIF_ACCESS_TOKEN = "xtmSOIxjPwq0pOMB1WvcZgFLU9QBklauOlonWl8K5oaLIx8RniJLrvcJU4v9H7Et"
)
# Note: the above is not a real access token. Do not try using it.
```

, or by adding it to a `Renviron` startup file (see
[here](https://rviews.rstudio.com/2017/04/19/r-for-enterprise-understanding-r-s-startup/)
for details).

## Usage

Download occurrence data from FinBIF.

``` r
finbif_occurrence("Cygnus cygnus", n = 100)
```

## Citation

Data from FinBIF comes from many sources. For information on citing
FinBIF itself and the contributed datasets please visit this link:

<https://laji.fi/en/about/2986>

To cite the finbif R package in publications please use:

Morris, William K. (2026). Introduction to the finbif package. R package
version 0.9.13.9001, <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.3612814>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contributing

Development is a community effort, and we encourage participation.
Please read [the contribution
guide](https://github.com/luomus/finbif/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for
details.

Please note that the ‘finbif’ project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://github.com/luomus/finbif/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## The finbif package

Package overview

- [`finbif`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif-package.md)
  [`finbif-package`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif-package.md)
  : finbif: Interface for the 'Finnish Biodiversity Information
  Facility' API

## Access token

Getting an access token

- [`finbif_request_token()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_request_token.md)
  [`finbif_renew_token()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_request_token.md)
  : Get a FinBIF personal access token

## Metadata

Exploring metadata

- [`finbif_metadata()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_metadata.md)
  : FinBIF metadata
- [`finbif_collections()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_collections.md)
  : FinBIF collections
- [`finbif_informal_groups()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_informal_groups.md)
  : FinBIF informal groups

## Taxonomy

Getting information on taxa

- [`finbif_check_taxa()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_check_taxa.md)
  : Check FinBIF taxa
- [`finbif_taxa()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_taxa.md)
  [`common_name()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_taxa.md)
  [`scientific_name()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_taxa.md)
  [`taxon_id()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_taxa.md)
  : Search the FinBIF taxa

## Records

Getting records from finbif

- [`finbif_last_mod()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_last_mod.md)
  : Get last modified date for FinBIF occurrence records
- [`finbif_occurrence()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_occurrence.md)
  : Download FinBIF occurrence records
- [`finbif_occurrence_load()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_occurrence_load.md)
  : Load FinBIF occurrence records from a file
- [`filters`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/filters.md)
  : Filtering FinBIF records
- [`to_dwc()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/to_dwc.md)
  [`to_native()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/to_dwc.md)
  [`from_schema()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/to_dwc.md)
  : Convert variable names
- [`variables`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/variables.md)
  : FinBIF record variables

## Cache

Caching finbif downloads

- [`caching`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/caching.md)
  : Caching FinBIF downloads
- [`finbif_clear_cache()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_clear_cache.md)
  : Clear cache
- [`finbif_update_cache()`](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/reference/finbif_update_cache.md)
  : Update cache

  records](https://finbif-docs-dev.netlify.app/articles/v05_filtering.md):
